title: Enhance Admin Dashboard Analytics
description: Update SalesAnalytics schema and get_dashboard endpoint to include daily stats for the last 30 days and attention_needed counts for specific order statuses.
acceptance_criteria: SalesAnalytics schema includes daily_stats: List[dict] with date, revenue, orders.
SalesAnalytics schema includes attention_needed: dict with counts for NEW, UNPAID, SHIPPED, PROBLEM.
get_dashboard (and /admin/stats) returns correct daily statistics for the last 30 days.
attention_needed counts reflect the actual number of orders in those statuses.
The code passes ruff and mypy checks.
